name: fluid-flow
description: Hydraulic boundary conditions for the fracture-flow / pore-pressure model — fluid flux and sources, plus pore pressure applied to joints via 'block contact apply'.

notes: 'block face apply flux ...' for boundary inflow; 'block gridpoint apply source ...' for point sources.
'block contact apply pore-pressure <f>' sets joint pore pressure for hydro-mechanical coupling.
